ttl.name: WIRELESS DOOR LOCK CONTROL SYSTEM (w/o Smart Key System)

item.ptxt: Register the recognition code when replacing the door control transmitter or the door control receiver.

Add mode is used to register new recognition codes while still retaining codes already registered. This mode is used when a new transmitter is added. If the number of registered codes exceeds 6, the previously registered codes will be erased in order, starting from the first registered code.

Rewrite mode is used to erase all the previously registered recognition codes in order to register all-new recognition codes. This mode is used when the transmitter or the door control receiver is replaced with a new one.
Confirmation mode is used to confirm how many recognition codes have already been registered before another recognition code is registered.
Prohibition mode is used to erase all the registered codes and disable the wireless door lock function.
This mode is used when the transmitter is lost.
All the following registration procedures must be performed in order.

s-1.ptxt: REGISTRATION OF RECOGNITION CODE (USING INTELLIGENT TESTER)

s2.ptxt: Select the add or rewrite mode according to the intelligent tester display.
The number of registered codes is indicated.
Registration of the door control transmitter.

s3.ptxt: If the add mode or rewrite mode has been selected, press the LOCK and UNLOCK switches on the transmitter simultaneously.
Within 3 seconds of releasing the LOCK and UNLOCK switches, press either of the switches on the door control transmitter.

item.ptxt: Do not press the LOCK and UNLOCK switches simultaneously for more than 1.5 seconds.
Do the operation within 1 meter of the driver's seat to register the transmitter.
Do not push other transmitter switches during the transmitter registration process.

s3.ptxt: The main body ECU automatically performs the power door LOCK-UNLOCK operation once and sounds the wireless door lock buzzer twice, in order to indicate whether registration has been completed correctly or not.
If registration is continued, the next recognition code must be registered in the door control transmitter within 30 seconds.

atten4.ptxt: Up to 6 recognition codes can be registered.

s3.ptxt: The registration mode will cease when any of the following occurs:

item.ptxt: 30 seconds or more have elapsed after a code is registered.
The intelligent tester is used to complete.
The ignition switch is turned off.

s2.ptxt: Perform the following after registration is completed.

s3.ptxt: Perform the wireless door lock control operation check (See page ).

atten4.ptxt: If the wireless door lock control does not operate, perform the registration procedure again.
